name: cinnamomum camphora
title: cinnamomum camphora benefits
description: Cinnamomum camphora reduces stress by decreasing anxiety and promoting relaxation, thereby improving overall mental well-being. This benefit is important as excessive stress can lead to various health issues, such as insomnia, digestive problems, and weakened immune systems, which can further exacerbate conditions like depression, anxiety disorders, and cardiovascular diseases. The plant's ability to reduce stress is attributed to its bioactive constituents, including camphor, linalool...
